svg.title: HydroMind complete system architecture
svg.desc: Data flows from ESP32 sensor through MQTT broker to FastAPI backend, which connects to databases, AI services, scheduling, and broadcasting channels, finally reaching the React dashboard and users.

g.text: D3 river • Forecast • Alerts • Tamil chat copilot
① Sensor reads water level → ② Broker routes to backend → ③ Backend queries weather + retrain ML → ④ Alert engine decides → ⑤ Broadcast via SMS/voice/push → ⑥ Dashboard updates live
